title: The Battle for the Baratie Escalates
description: On pages 1–1, Krieg’s forces push harder against the Baratie, using numbers, weapons, and intimidation while Sanji and the cooks struggle to hold the line.
scene: The restaurant becomes a battlefield where Krieg’s idea of strength clashes with the Baratie’s pride and the Straw Hats’ refusal to yield.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is it really true that you can't see the side of your own face with only one mirror? I mean if you just look to the side then... in an instant... turn! I'm sure if I can turn quickly enough... turn! I can see... turn! An Afterimage... turn! Turn!

summary: This part keeps increasing the pressure on the Baratie and exposes the brutality of Krieg’s command structure.
